2026-02-15T03:23:40.666+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Refunded 2000 tokens for user 1, execution exec-3-b9b144b8

testcase.name: noSpringSecurityJwtRequired
testcase.system-out: 2026-02-15T03:23:41.132+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.r.l.controller.InternalLlmController : Internal LLM chat: userId=1, executionId=exec-no-jwt 2026-02-15T03:23:41.152+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.r.llm.service.LlmGatewayService : LLM chat completed: model=test-model, tokens=10

testcase.name: fullChainWithBilling
testcase.system-out: 2026-02-15T03:23:41.240+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Charged 10000 tokens for user 1 2026-02-15T03:23:41.255+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.r.l.controller.InternalLlmController : Internal LLM chat: userId=1, executionId=exec-1 2026-02-15T03:23:41.273+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Frozen 2000 tokens for user 1, execution exec-1-ae08a848 2026-02-15T03:23:41.286+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.r.llm.service.LlmGatewayService : LLM chat completed: model=test-model, tokens=500 2026-02-15T03:23:41.299+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.rpacloud.llm.service.AccountService : Settled 500 tokens for user 1, execution exec-1-ae08a848

testcase.name: fullChainWithoutBilling
testcase.system-out: 2026-02-15T03:23:41.564+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.r.l.controller.InternalLlmController : Internal LLM chat: userId=1, executionId=exec-2 2026-02-15T03:23:41.576+08:00 INFO 84080 --- [ main] c.r.llm.service.LlmGatewayService : LLM chat completed: model=test-model, tokens=100
